datapoints.description: Hub accepted the managed cluster registration (1=accepted, 0=not accepted)
datapoints.name: hub_accepted

datapoints.description: Total worker CPU cores reported by the managed cluster
datapoints.name: worker_cores

description: Discovers managed clusters and monitors availability, join status, hub acceptance, and worker capacity via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers managed clusters from acm_managed_cluster_labels (which carries the name label) and monitors status conditions from acm_managed_cluster_status_condition. All metric names and label keys verified against live ACM 2.15.1 deployment. The worker_cores value comes from the core_worker label on acm_managed_cluster_labels, extracted during discovery.
name: ACM_Managed_Cluster_Status
